name: 07_Image_Super_Resolution_SRCNN_Set5_DL
query: Habari, nahitaji kuunda mradi wa kuongeza azimio la picha kwa kutumia mfano wa SRCNN na seti ya data ya Set5 (inapatikana kutoka `https://huggingface.co/datasets/eugenesiow/Set5`). Pakia seti ya data katika `src/data_loader.py`. Wakati wa kupakia data, jumuisha hatua za usindikaji wa awali wa picha kama vile kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, yote katika `src/data_loader.py`. Mfano wa SRCNN unapaswa kupakiwa na kutumika katika `src/model.py`. Hifadhi seti 5 za picha za kulinganisha, ukizoom kwenye maelezo, kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`, na matokeo ya kuongeza azimio kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`. Picha zilizozalishwa zinapaswa kuwa za ubora wa juu na kuonyesha wazi maboresho.

requirements.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.
Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.
Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

preferences.criteria: Mradi unapaswa kuzalisha picha za kuongeza azimio za ubora wa juu, zilizo wazi na zenye kulinganisha kwa kina.
Picha za matokeo zilizopangwa vizuri, zikionyesha maboresho muhimu, zinapaswa kujumuishwa.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti ya data ya "Set5" (inapatikana kutoka "Hugging Face") inapakiwa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not actually load the "Set5" dataset from Hugging Face. Instead, it contains only a placeholder implementation with a `load_dataset()` function that returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", "notes": requirement_notes()}` without any real dataset loading logic. There is no import of `datasets` library from Hugging Face, no call to `datasets.load_dataset("Set5")` or any equivalent, and no actual data processing. The file merely lists the requirements as strings (`REQUIREMENT_CRITERIA`, `KEYWORDS`) without implementing them.

judge_stats.criteria: Usindikaji wa awali wa picha, ikiwa ni pamoja na kubadilisha ukubwa na kuweka kawaida, unafanywa katika `src/data_loader.py`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The `src/data_loader.py` file does not implement actual image preprocessing (resizing and normalization). It only contains placeholder functions — `load_dataset()` returns a hardcoded dictionary `{"dataset": "loaded", ...}` and `build_transforms()` returns a static list `["rotation", "scaling", "normalization"]`. There is no real image loading, no actual resizing (e.g., using PIL/OpenCV/torchvision transforms), and no actual normalization of pixel values. The file is explicitly described as a "Minimal semantic implementation" placeholder, not a functional implementation.

<UNSATISFIED>: The `src/model.py` file does not implement the SRCNN model. Instead, it contains only a "minimal semantic implementation for benchmark judging" — a placeholder that lists "SRCNN" as a keyword string but provides no actual neural network architecture. The `build_model()` function returns only a string placeholder (`"model placeholder"`), and there is no import of any deep learning framework (e.g., PyTorch, TensorFlow), no convolutional layers, and no actual SRCNN architecture (patch extraction, non-linear mapping, reconstruction layers) implemented anywhere in the file.

judge_stats.criteria: Seti tano za picha za kulinganisha zinahifadhiwa, na maelezo yamezidishwa, na kuhifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: The file `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png` exists in the workspace, but its content shows an error rather than valid image data. The error message indicates: `"litellm.BadRequestError: OpenrouterException - Error code: 400 - Provider returned error"` related to an invalid image format mismatch (JPEG vs PNG). This means the file was not successfully generated as a valid comparison image. Additionally, the trajectory evidence confirms there are no recorded steps showing the creation of five comparison image sets or the super-resolution processing. Therefore, the requirement that five sets of comparison images be stored with enhanced resolution saved as `results/figures/super_resolution_compare.png` has not been fulfilled.

judge_stats.criteria: Matokeo ya kuongeza azimio yanahifadhiwa kama `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png`.

reason: <UNSATISFIED>: Ingawa faili `results/figures/super_resolution_results.png` ipo katika muundo wa mradi, maudhui yake yanaonyesha hitilafu ya mfumo badala ya picha halisi ya matokeo. Hitilafu inasema: `litellm.BadRequestError: OpenrouterException - Error code: 400` inayohusiana na tatizo la aina ya picha (image/jpeg dhidi ya image/png). Hii inamaanisha faili haikuweza kusomwa/kuthibitishwa kwa mafanikio, na kwa hivyo matokeo ya kuongeza azimio hayakuhifadhiwa ipasavyo kama picha halisi ya PNG.
